name: Bacon and Onion Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon until crisp in a skillet.
2. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
3. Sauté the onion in 1 tablespoon of bacon drippings until tender (do not brown).
4. Set aside to cool.
5. In a large mixing bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
6. In a small bowl, combine eggs, milk, and sour cream; blend well.
7. Add the egg mixture all at once to the dry ingredients and stir just enough to moisten.
8. Stir in the bacon and sautéed onion.
9. Spoon batter into greased 2 1/2-inch muffin pan cups, filling each about 2/3 full.
10. Sprinkle sesame seeds over the top of each muffin.
11. Bake at 375 degrees F for 18 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
12. Serve hot with homemade jelly or jam.
